name: Gesundheitswelt Chiemgau AG
summary: Gesundheitswelt Chiemgau AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides health and wellness services in Germany. It operates clinics for orthopedic treatment and rehabilitation, geriatric rehabilitation, psychosomatic hospital treatment, oncology and cardiology, psychosomatic hospital treatment, and psychosomatics and psychotherapy; center of sports and rehabilitation diagnostics; and ambulatory and outpatient rehabilitation and health centers. The company was formerly known as Jod-Thermalbad Endorf AG and changed its name to Gesundheitswelt Chiemgau AG in July 2003. The company is headquartered in Bad Endorf, Germany. Gesundheitswelt Chiemgau AG is a subsidiary of Stiftung 'gesundheitswelt Chiemgau' Bad Endorf Gmbh.
